name: snakebyte
description: Local bot and optimization workspace for CodinGame Winter Challenge 2026.

scripts.docker:npm-install: docker compose run --rm dev npm install
scripts.docker:engine-install: docker compose run --rm dev mvn -f engine/pom.xml install -DskipTests
scripts.docker:bootstrap: docker compose run --rm dev bash -lc "npm install && mvn -f engine/pom.xml install -DskipTests"
scripts.docker:match: docker compose run --rm dev npm run match:ts
scripts.docker:match:starter: docker compose run --rm dev npm run match:starter
